channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: 'No Illegal Cattle Transportation': BJP Government In Bengal Begins Crackdown On Smuggling | Exclusive
item.description: For decades, illegal cattle transportation and smuggling have remained a persistent concern in several border and transit districts of West Bengal.

item.title: Why Hantavirus From Rodents Killed 3 Cruise Passengers & Why It Matters To India
item.description: The virus can cause two serious illnesses: Hantavirus pulmonary syndrome, which attacks lungs, or haemorrhagic fever with renal syndrome, which damages the kidneys. Both are fatal

item.title: JPMorgan Hikes Kospi Bull Case Target to 10,000 on Memory Boom
item.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. raised its targets for South Korean stocks for the second time in less than a month, citing improvement in the semiconductor cycle, corporate governance reforms and industrial-sector growth.

item.title: Iran says it will 'never bow' as Trump rejects peace counteroffer, prolonging Middle East conflict
item.description: Washington has sought to press Beijing to lean on Tehran to reopen the strait, though China's appetite to act as a pressure mechanism remains unclear.

item.title: Modi Urges Indians to Conserve Fuel
item.description: Indian Prime Minister Modi appealed to citizens to cut fuel use and said measures from the Covid pandemic such as working from home and online meetings should be used. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Stocks to watch: Canara Bank, Indian Hotels, MCX, Swiggy among 10 shares in focus today
item.description: Stock market today: The Indian stock market is likely to continue its losing streak as trends in the Gift Nifty index signalled a negative opening on Monday. Amid this backdrop, these stocks will remain in focus on 11 May.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz Blockade Worsens, but Maritime Supply Chain Early Warning System Lags Behind - 아시아경제
item.description: Strait of Hormuz Blockade Worsens, but Maritime Supply Chain Early Warning System Lags Behind 아시아경제

item.title: Raja Venkatraman, MarketSmith recommend five stocks for 11 May
item.description: The Indian stock market saw losses on 8 May, with Sensex down 516 points and Nifty 50 down 151 points due to banking stock weakness. Analysts suggest buying Metropolis Healthcare, Bharat Forge, and Timken India based on recovery trends and market analysis.

item.title: Oil Price Today (May 11): Crude oil back above $100 on no breakthrough in US-Iran peace talks. What are experts saying?
item.description: Oil prices surged over $3 a barrel as the U.S. and Iran failed to reach a peace agreement, keeping the Strait of Hormuz largely shut and global supplies pressured. President Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. proposal, citing its unacceptability.

item.title: Australia’s Budget May Lead to Lower Bond Supply, Analysts Say
item.description: Australia’s yield curve may flatten and its premium to US Treasuries narrow if the government signals a pullback in bond issuance next year, reflecting more restrained fiscal spending, according to strategists.

item.title: Buy or sell: Gift Nifty down, Vaishali Parekh recommends three stocks to buy today —11 May 2026
item.description: Buy or sell: Gift Nifty down, Vaishali Parekh recommends three stocks to buy today — Morepen Laboratories, Reliance, and AU Small Finance Bank

item.title: China consumer, wholesale inflation tops estimates in April as Iran war drives energy costs higher
item.description: China has cushioned the worst of the energy shock through its strategic oil stockpiles and a diversified mix of renewable energy sources.

item.title: Delhi braces for heavy rain as fresh western disturbance hits; IMD issues yellow alert
item.description: Thundery developments are forecast for Wednesday, following which temperatures will gradually rise again.

item.title: Reliance to Offer All New Shares in Jio IPO in U-Turn, ET Says
item.description: Reliance Industries Ltd. is reversing its plans for the initial public offering of Jio Platforms Ltd., potentially India’s largest ever, to issue new shares instead of an offering by existing investors, the Economic Times reported, citing unidentified people familiar with the talks.

item.title: DW News. . Just days before a high-stakes Trump–Xi summit, Beijing has moved to armor-plate its economy against Western pressure, while increasing the squeeze on Europe to pick a side. From laws making it harder for Western firms to de-couple to blockin - facebook.com
item.description: DW News. . Just days before a high-stakes Trump–Xi summit, Beijing has moved to armor-plate its economy against Western pressure, while increasing the squeeze on Europe to pick a side. From laws making it harder for Western firms to de-couple to blockin facebook.com

item.title: Value 360 Communications shares to list today. Here's what GMP signals ahead of debut
item.description: Value 360 Communications is set for its stock market debut on Monday, with grey market signals indicating a flat listing near its upper issue price of Rs 98. The Rs 41.69 crore IPO, which saw strong institutional interest but subdued retail demand, was subscribed 1.20 times overall.

item.title: Nifty 50, Sensex prediction today: Check how Indian stock market is expected to trade on 11 May
item.description: Nifty 50, Sensex prediction today: The trends on Gift Nifty also indicate a negative start for the Indian benchmark index. The Gift Nifty was trading around 24,055 level, a discount of nearly 179 points from the Nifty futures’ previous close.

item.title: Sensex Today | Nifty 50 | Stock Market Live Updates: GIFT Nifty signals a negative start; Asian shares trade higher
Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
item.description: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

item.title: Gold falls on oil-driven inflation worries as US–Iran peace talks falter
item.description: Gold prices dipped as stalled U.S.-Iran peace talks fueled oil price hikes, raising inflation and interest rate hike fears. The dollar's strength further impacted bullion. Meanwhile, China's gold output declined, and Indian demand softened as buyers awaited lower prices. Speculators, however, increased their long positions.

item.title: South Korea's Kospi hits fresh record as Asia markets trade mixed amid oil surge, Iran risks
item.description: Investors headed into Monday on edge as Trump’s rejection of Iran’s ceasefire proposal fueled concerns about a prolonged Middle East conflict.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: "Totally Unacceptable," Says Trump As He Rejects Iran Peace Response
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates

item.title: Dollar strengthens as Trump says Iran peace offer 'unacceptable'
item.description: The dollar strengthened against major currencies early Monday. Strong US jobs data and ongoing geopolitical tensions involving Iran and the US boosted demand for the safe-haven currency. Oil prices saw a jump. China's export growth accelerated in April. US President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping are set to discuss key global issues later this week.

item.title: On Mamata Banerjee's clarion call to join forces against ‘enemy’ BJP, CPI(M), Congress say ‘absolutely not’
item.description: Adhir Ranjan Chowdhury, who has been one of the vocal critics of Mamata Banerjee, said the former Bengal chief minister was seeking support from all the parties she once tried to destroy.

item.title: Microsoft boss Satya Nadella to testify on his role in OpenAI's founding
item.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella is expected to take the stand Monday in Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI, to explain emails that revealed how his company funded the ChatGPT creator's shift from philanthropic organisation to for-profit AI giant. He will rely on recently disclosed Microsoft emails from January 2018 to demonstrate that the tech giant only opened its checkbook once a profit appeared possible.

item.title: Crude oil prices jump 4% on US-Iran peace talks failure; Brent crude near $104 per barrel
item.description: US-Iran war: Brent crude futures rose $3.18, or 3.14%, to $104.47 a barrel, building on Friday’s 1.23% gain. Here's what's driving the rally in crude oil prices.

item.title: An Apache HTTP server flaw lets attackers crash — or take over — millions of web servers with a single HTTP/2 request - MSN
item.description: An Apache HTTP server flaw lets attackers crash — or take over — millions of web servers with a single HTTP/2 request MSN

item.title: China’s Factory Inflation Hits Post-Covid High After Cost Shock
item.description: China’s factory prices grew at the fastest pace since the pandemic four years ago as the fallout from the Iran war sharply raises costs.

item.title: Heatwave warning: Rajasthan, Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh on IMD's alert as mercury hits 46.8°C — full weather forecast here
item.description: Weather today: IMD warned of a heatwave in parts of Rajasthan, Gujarat and Madhya Pradesh, with temperatures reaching 46°C. Meanwhile, Jammu and Kashmir, Punjab and Haryana can brace for heavy rainfall today, according to IMD.

item.title: Affle posts 20% revenue growth as AI-led advertising business expands across markets - Storyboard18
item.description: Affle posts 20% revenue growth as AI-led advertising business expands across markets Storyboard18

item.title: Pidilite walks pricing tightrope as raw material costs soar
item.description: Pidilite has raised prices twice to offset a 40–50% spike in input costs triggered by the West Asia war, but sustaining peak margins amid inflation may prove difficult.

item.title: From Gift Nifty, US-Iran peace talks, oil prices to Kospi: 8 things that changed for Indian stock market over weekend
item.description: Gift Nifty was trading around 24,092 level, a discount of nearly 142 points from the Nifty futures’ previous close, indicating a negative start for the Indian stock market indices.

item.title: IMD Warns of Severe Thunderstorms, Hailstorms Across Multiple States; Heatwave Continues in Western India - Republic World
item.description: IMD Warns of Severe Thunderstorms, Hailstorms Across Multiple States; Heatwave Continues in Western India Republic World

item.title: Increasing strength of Parliament to 850 a ‘joke’, says Tharoor
item.description: BJP leader K. Annamalai said the delimitation exercise was a “grand bargain” between the North and South Indian States before the outcome of the ongoing Census is made public

item.title: Chinese Refiner Seeing Strong Platinum Demand From New Contract
item.description: A major Chinese metals refiner is seeing a large volume of demand for platinum to deliver against a new local futures contract, a sign of how the product is luring more of the metal into the country.

item.title: CM selection a democratic process: Chennithala
item.description: The senior Congress leader slams BJP, says the grand old party does not function on instructions from Nagpur

item.title: Oil prices jump after Trump dismisses Iran proposal to end war
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments.

item.title: China Confirms Xi-Trump Summit That Was Delayed by Iran War
item.description: Beijing officially announced the date of Donald Trump’s state visit this week, publicly green-lighting the first US presidential trip to China in nearly a decade despite tensions over the Iran war.

item.title: Two Indians aboard cruise ship with hantavirus cases evacuated to Netherlands
item.description: Indian Ambassador to Spain Jayant N. Khobragade is in close contact with Spanish authorities and the two Indians to assure their well-being and safety

item.title: Global Market Today: Tech boost lifts Asian stocks as Iran risks push oil higher
item.description: Asian stocks advanced, led by AI-focused companies, as traders overlooked Middle East tensions. Despite rising oil prices and concerns over inflation, the market remains optimistic about corporate profits driven by AI investments. Investors are largely betting on a de-escalation in the Middle East, though volatility persists.
